fields.description:
## Why
The bot is being dropped; its code is the bug surface (15a1/0d3e/dc33). Deleting it is the resolution of those bugs.
## What
- [ ] Delete infra/autolander/ (loop.py, gerrit.py, failure.py, land.py, __init__.py) and tests/autolander/.
- [ ] Remove the land / land-status command (its own argparse main in land.py) and docs/land-contract.md.
- [ ] Remove code/config refs to the deleted package (grep sweep the hyphenated forms: `autolander`, `land-contract`, `land-status`). NOTE: the standalone package has no src/ importers, no pyproject entry point, and no module-size-allowlist entry, so removal is self-contained.
- [ ] Fix the docs/-internal links to the deleted docs/land-contract.md so the docs-index / dead-link checker (scripts/check_docs_index.py, tests/unit/test_check_docs_index.py) stays green: drop the docs/README.md index entry; de-link the two `../land-contract.md` references in docs/adr/0042.
## Scope (division with sibling children)
- This story removes the **code + docs/land-contract.md + docs/-internal links** to it. The docs-index checker only scans `docs/`, so fixing the docs/-internal links keeps THIS change's CI green.
- The **top-level prose** references (README.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, CLAUDE.md) that describe the retired auto-lander / `land` / `Autosubmit` / FFO narrative are rewritten wholesale by sibling **5e7a** (the repo-wide docs sweep) — removing a link mid-narrative here would leave broken prose. Those files are NOT top-level-scanned by the docs checker, so they do not break CI in the interim.
- Deployed-infra references (Dockerfile.autolander, compose, terraform, nginx, scripts) are sibling **bcf0**.
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No references to the `infra/autolander` package path or the `land`/`land-status` command remain in code/tests/config (grep clean for `infra/autolander` and `land-status`).
- [ ] `docs/` is link-clean: `python scripts/check_docs_index.py --check` exits 0 (no broken relative links, no unindexed living doc).
- [ ] make lint && make typecheck && make test green.
- [ ] [operator-attested] Close bugs dc33, 15a1, 0d3e as obsolete — record the close-event IDs/timestamps as attestation on this ticket when this change lands (deleting the auto-lander code IS their resolution).
